description: Trigify is a social listening tool that scans real-time social activity for buying signals, helping B2B teams find leads from engagement, keywords, and mentions.
overview: Trigify scans real-time social media activity to surface buying signals, showing which people engage with relevant accounts, keywords, and competitors so teams can act on intent.
what_is: Trigify is a social listening tool that turns social activity into leads. It scans posts, engagement, and mentions in real time to show which people and accounts are active around the topics, competitors, and profiles that matter to your business.

It is strongest at tracking account and profile engagement, surfacing new audiences, and monitoring competitor activity, which helps growth and marketing teams find sales-ready conversations quickly rather than waiting on cold lists.

Trigify feeds timely social insight into CRMs and marketing automation to sharpen prospecting and targeting. It is not a CRM or full marketing platform; it adds a layer of social-intent data to the tools you already use.
